problems_encountered.description: MCP tools not accessible in current Claude Code execution context. Tools are confirmed to exist in the inventory (evals/inventory/tools-current.json) and MCP server shows as connected, but tools cannot be invoked programmatically in this agent execution environment.

tool_response_summary: Tool could not be executed - MCP tools not available in this execution context
execution_notes: Environment limitation: MCP tools require interactive Claude Code session or different execution context. The mittwald MCP server is confirmed connected via 'claude mcp list', but tools are not accessible for programmatic invocation by agents. This appears to be a limitation of the agent execution environment rather than a tool failure. Manual testing in interactive mode would be required to validate these tools.
